name: Mazatlán Fisherman's Stew (Mexican Bouillabaisse)
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup crumbled Cacique brand Cotija cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Any available seafood can be added.
2. Start by making the fish broth with the fish bones: Using a large pot, combine the Roma tomatoes, onion, garlic, celery, and carrots, lime juice, white wine, water, and fish bones. Bring to boil. Skim off any foam or residue. Simmer for 2 hours. Strain and return liquid to pot.
3. Add the remaining raw ingredients and simmer for 10 minutes.
4. Serve topped with Cotija cheese and cilantro.
